variants: Hibiki Tomikawa has a rich background in music, cultivated at the Silverpine Music Academy, which he attended after being born in Reedwharf Village. He now applies his knowledge in his role at Birchfall Networks, where he specializes in Valencian speech. Beyond his professional endeavors, Hibiki is an active volunteer with the Kindred Spirits Coalition, contributing to community-building efforts. His dedication to both his career and civic involvement highlights his commitment to enhancing connections among people.
